articles.title: FBI probes Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
articles.description:
Police in Austin shot and killed the gunman, who used both a pistol and a rifle to carry out the attack, police said.

The post FBI probes Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and injured 14 as a potential terrorist act.
Gunman, armed with a pistol and rifle, was shot dead by police in Austin.
Boston residents urged to remain vigilant amid rising concerns over similar violent incidents.

articles.title: Cher’s son charged with simple assault and trespassing at New Hampshire private school
articles.description:
Elijah Allman, 49, was charged with four misdemeanors: two counts of simple assault, criminal trespass and criminal threatening.

The post Cher’s son charged with simple assault and trespassing at New Hampshire private school appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Elijah Allman, 49, charged with four misdemeanors at a New Hampshire school.
Charges include two counts of simple assault and criminal trespass.
Incident raises concerns about safety at private institutions near Boston.

articles.title: An update: Did a Brooklyn couple kill a neighbor’s trees for a better view in Maine?
articles.description:
The state approved a settlement that included a $3,000 fine but no acknowledgment of guilt for a tree poisoning that riled people in scenic Rockport, Maine.

The post An update: Did a Brooklyn couple kill a neighbor’s trees for a better view in Maine? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine state approved a $3,000 fine for tree poisoning incident in Rockport.
The couple involved, from Brooklyn, did not admit guilt in the settlement.
Local residents remain concerned about property rights and environmental impacts.
